feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Cloud Applications Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Cloud Applications Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error in command npm install -g hana-cli in SAP HANA CAP Project
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following SAP Tutorial 'Combine CAP with SAP HANA Cloud to Create Full-Stack Fiori Applications' ( https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-project.html ), there at step 5 'Install dependencies', when I am trying to execute the command npm install -g hana-cli in order to use an open source sample utility called hana-cli to help with development tasks, I am getting below error -

I also tried by updating the node and npm to their latest versions. But same error is coming.

Kindly let me know how to solve this error to proceed ahead.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Standard field (Customer) in Ticket QC doesn't trigger After Modify for specific Accounts
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are facing one issue while triggering After modify event in Service Request BO. We want to populate a validation message after the Customer field is selected in the Quick create screen.

The event is getting triggered while selecting the customer field which is an Individual Customer and Account which does not have a main Contact associated with it.

The Event After Modify is not getting triggered specifically for the scenario where Account Customer doesn't have a main contact.

Please let me know if there is any workaround for this.

entry.title: Filling node field according to another field
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have the current custom BO:

import AP.Common.GDT as apCommonGDT;
import AP.PDI.bo;


businessobject TPRSystem {<br>   [Label ("Employee ID")] element employeeID : BusinessPartnerInternalID;
   [Label ("Employee Name")]element employeeName : LANGUAGEINDEPENDENT_MEDIUM_Name;
   
   node productInfo [0,n]
   {
   element ProductID: ProductInternalID;
   element ProductName: SHORT_Description;
   }
}

I have created an OVS for employeeID and a query to retrieve the respective employeeName for that employeeID.
Now I need to do the same for productID and productName. I got the OVS running for productID, but can't seem to figure out how to write the query to retrieve the respective productName.

I tried using a foreach loop, but I'm not sure of the exact syntax and keep getting errors.

Any help would be appreciated,
Regards,
Ramzy Chehab

Edit: Still looking for a solution

entry.title: How to associate an individual Customer to a exitent lead?
entry.content:
Hi team!

I need to create a new button (Done!) that allows me to create a new Customer from a Lead and then associate with the Lead.

I created a new Script in the Extended BO Lead. This Scripts is creating this new Customer but I need to associate this new Customer to the Lead. (Is a way to automate the flow that allows to associate an existent Customer to a lead with the button called "Associate Lead to an account").

I didn't find a way to do it through ABSL Code.

Can any one help me?

Regards Pablo.

entry.title: Can we create same Copy of standard object tasks in SAP C4C
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

I want to Create duplicate Activity task with same features what we have in standard Object Activity Task in SAP C4C is it possible ?

If yes can you provide me the steps.activiry-task.png

horst.schaude,alessandro.iannacci Please advise.

entry.title: Automate Consumption for Project Screen
entry.content:
Dear all,

I currently have a custom BO similar to what the consumption for project screen looks like. What is the next step I should follow if I want to use the information in my custom BO whenever the user saves data, to fill the consumption for project screen and automatically confirm that page?

Regards,
Ramzy Chehab

entry.title: Updating massive data in a client BO using Excel
entry.content:
Currently, we have a client BO(Business Object) which integrates with other BO's in a standard way; so far, updating them one by one works correctly. However, the user needs to update these data in bulk. As an alternative, we enabled the option through Workbench, but this is not user-friendly for the client.

There is a need for an import option from Excel, similar to the standard option available in Territories:

1.- Select the “upload territory team” option.

2.- The template will be downloaded, and then the data can be updated from Excel.

3.- Upon saving the data, it updates in real-time in Sales Cloud.

It is required that the client BO data update can be performed in the same way(similar to print). Is this possible to implement through SDK development? We have reviewed the documentation and some official blogs, but have found no information regarding this...
Thanks for your help 🙂

entry.title: Technical User SSO Login
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can we use Technical User for SSO Login

Thanks

Srinivasan

entry.title: Ship To Party is not getting replicated from S4 to C4C
entry.content:
Hi Team,

It is existing configuration and daily many account "ship to party" of account from partner function are getting replicating from S4 to C4C.

But for 1 account ship to party is not replicated from S4 to C4C and in C4C system under relationship tab we don't have option to add Ship to party but rest of role we can add except "Ship-to-party"

And there is no failed web service in C4C , Can anyone please suggest the steps to check this Ship-to-party failed reason and then based on failed reason , we can fix the issue and move this ship to party partner function from S4 to C4C. Please find attached screen shot of it.

Thanks and Regards,

MD

entry.title: SAP Cloud Applications Studio 2311 (Pilot)
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

unfortunately, the pilot version of SAP Cloud Applications studio (currently version 2311) is still very unstable.

My setup: Macbook pro M1 chip with Parallels. I installed cloud application studio within parallels and windows 11.

The debugging stops always and says that connection is lost, even after activating and restarting multiple times.

On top of that, mouse over variable names doesn´t show any information anymore.

Can you please and stabilize the pilot version? The issues exist for years....

Thank you and best regards

Rufat

entry.title: Disable edit of custom BO instance based on condition
entry.content:
Hi all,

For a specific project we have created a custom BO with root level data and 2 nodes, readers and editors. It should allow end users to open an instance of the custom BO (TI screen) and to add employees to the reader or editor list. This is because we want to maintain the permissions of read/edit SPECIFICALLY for the custom BO instance. So permission are different per instance of the BO.

When clicking open a specific instance of the BO, we have some logic to determine if the currently logged in user is in the editor list and if so, we put a transient boolean to true.If not, we put this to false.

Now the main question is: how can I use that boolean to disable/enable the edit pencil icon? If the boolean is true, we want to keep it enabled. If it is false, we want it disabled. I checked in the UI designer but there we don't seem to be able to configure that edit button.

Any ideas?

entry.title: How to get triggered save button on Customer - Marketingattributes.
entry.content:
Hi,

I have to implement some logic in Cloud for Customer after saving Customer.

I created a business object extension BusinessPartner/Global ->  Customer. When I change something at the customer, my event aftersave is triggered.

Now when I change something on the tab marketingattributes the event is not triggered. Also I tried the business object extension BusinessAttributes/Global -> BusinessAttributeSet or Assignment. It does not work.

Where can I implement some logic when I changed the marketingattributes of a customer?

entry.title: How to show Transient Field on BusinessPartner?
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a new Transient field on 

[Extension] businessobject AP.FO.BusinessPartner.Global:BusinessPartnerSolutionExtensions

If I enhance Screen, I got the Message: 

Cannot enhance screens; no UIs exist for business object BUPA_SOLUTION_EXTENSIONS

I want to show this field on BusinessPartner. How to do that?

entry.title: Access the SalePriceList Business Object association with the Supplier and Material Business Object
entry.content: I can't find the associations of SalesPriceList with the Supplier and Material Business Objects knowing that we need both these values to create a new Price List. I want to do a development on the ABSL where I have to access the Price in the PriceList through the material ID and Supplier ID but I can't seem to find any association in the repository view. Please let me know How I can achieve that. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: CreateSelectionParams not working as expected
entry.content:
Hi

I have Customer with phone number +48 202402071418

Next I'm making Customer query by Phone, like this: (note it's "2402071418" not "202402071418" in parameter)

 

var customerQueryComm = Customer.QueryByCommunicationData;
customerQueryComm_SelParams.Add(customerQueryComm.NormalisedPhoneNumberDescription, "I", "EQ", "2402071418");
customerQueryComm_Results = customerQueryComm.Execute(customerQueryComm_SelParams);

 

And I have 1 row in result! 

I mean, equal means equal, right? At least that's how it is in my English. In SAP English, equal means if it contains a substring, because 202402071418 is not equal to 2402071418

How to query for EQUAL value?

entry.title: Ability on validate Email address on sending an email with BADI VALIDATE_RECIPENT_EMAILOUT
entry.content:
HI Team,

I need to get info on new release about Ability on validate Email address on sending an email with BADI VALIDATE_RECIPENT_EMAILOUT.
It would be helpful if you can provide us BADI Documentation for our reference.

Regards, Tanuja

entry.title: Add Field from Custom BO to Standard BO
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a Custom BO and I want to show one field from Custom BO in the standard BusinessPartner BO.

Is this possible?

Thanks

entry.title: CAP Tutorial - CDS Command not found
entry.content:
Doing the tutorial at 
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-cap-app.html
And the stage "Build a CAP Application".

Step 4 - When the tutorial tells me to "Create a new project using cds init."

The terminal returns : 

user: projects $ cds init incident-management
bash: cds: command not found

Any suggestions please? My Workspace all seems in order...?

entry.title: How to extend service interface in cloud for customer?
entry.content:
Hi,

we have Incoming web service messages like BusinessPartnerReplicationIn. That updates the BusinessPartner in Cloud for Customer.

I want to extend this service interface. For example overwrite some data or ignore some fields.

Is that possible with SAP Cloud Applications Studio or in C4C?

Thanks.

entry.title: Implementation of Domain Warning Message for Non-Business Required Email Addresses on Ticket Screen
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

At the interaction level on the ticket screen, when a user enters a domain in the "To" field that is not business-required, we need to display a warning message (as a pop / Dialog box ) asking if they wish to proceed.

is it possible to enhance as per the requirememt?
Attached img for reference. 








Regards,
Tanuja T.
